headline: Is Fastenal’s (FAST) Margin Squeeze Rewriting the Narrative on Its Digital and FMI Strategy?
summary: Fastenal Company reported past first-quarter 2026 results with sales of US$2,201.7 million and net income of US$339.8 million, alongside dividends and share repurchases. While revenue and earnings increased, gross margin compression linked to customer mix and more direct material sales raised questions about the quality of that growth. We’ll now examine how Fastenal’s strong sales gains but pressured margins might influence its investment narrative built around digital and FMI...
